name: pipr
description: Pi-powered GitHub pull request review runtime

scripts.format:check:packages: biome check .github .pipr packages scripts action.yml Dockerfile package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.base.json turbo.json release-please-config.json .release-please-manifest.json .fallowrc.json --files-ignore-unknown=true
scripts.check:conventional-commit: bun scripts/check-conventional-commit.ts --message "chore: validate conventional commit check"
scripts.check:packages: bun run check:release-metadata && bun run check:conventional-commit && bun run check:scripts && bun run build:packages && turbo run lint typecheck test --filter='!@pipr/docs' && bun run format:check:packages && bun run fallow:packages
scripts.check:docs: turbo run lint typecheck test build --filter=@pipr/docs && bun run format:check:docs && bun run fallow:docs
scripts.check: bun run check:packages && bun run check:docs
